2603.16827.title: Prompt Programming for Cultural Bias and Alignment of Large Language Models
2603.16827.paper_summary: Culture shapes reasoning, values, prioritization, and strategic decision-making, yet large language models (LLMs) often exhibit cultural biases that misalign with target populations. As LLMs are increasingly used for strategic decision-making, policy support, and document engineering tasks such as summarization, categorization, and compliance-oriented auditing, improving cultural alignment is important for ensuring that downstream analyses and recommendations reflect target-population value profiles rather than default model priors. Previous work introduced a survey-grounded cultural alignment framework and showed that culture-specific prompting can reduce misalignment, but it primarily evaluated proprietary models and relied on manual prompt engineering. In this paper, we validate and extend that framework by reproducing its social sciences survey based projection and distance metrics on open-weight LLMs, testing whether the same cultural skew and benefits of culture conditioning persist outside closed LLM systems. Building on this foundation, we introduce use of prompt programming with DSPy for this problem-treating prompts as modular, optimizable programs-to systematically tune cultural conditioning by optimizing against cultural-distance objectives. In our experiments, we show that prompt optimization often improves upon cultural prompt engineering, suggesting prompt compilation with DSPy can provide a more stable and transferable route to culturally aligned LLM responses.
2603.16827.paper_summary_zh: 文化塑造推理、價值觀、優先順序和策略決策，然而大型語言模型（LLMs）經常顯示出與目標群體不一致的文化偏見。隨著 LLMs 在策略決策、政策支持以及文件工程任務（如摘要、分類和合規性審計）中的使用日益增加，改善文化對齊對於確保下游分析和建議反映目標群體的價值概況而非默認模型的先驗值至關重要。先前的研究介紹了一個基於調查的文化對齊框架，並顯示文化特定的提示可以減少不對齊，但主要評估了專有模型並依賴手動提示工程。在本文中，我們通過在開放權重的 LLMs 上重現其社會科學調查基於的投影和距離度量來驗證和擴展該框架，測試相同的文化偏斜和文化調節的好處是否在封閉的 LLM 系統之外持續存在。在此基礎上，我們引入使用 DSPy 進行提示編程，將提示視為模塊化、可優化的程序，以系統性地通過針對文化距離目標進行優化來調整文化調節。在我們的實驗中，我們顯示提示優化通常優於文化提示工程，這表明使用 DSPy 進行提示編譯可以提供一條更穩定和可轉移的路徑，以實現文化對齊的 LLM 回應。
2603.16827.author: Maksim Eren et.al.
2603.16827.authors: Maksim Eren, Eric Michalak, Brian Cook, Johnny Seales
